name: Sugarless Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine dates, chopped apples, raisins, and water.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Simmer for 3 minutes.
4. Remove from the heat and let cool.
5. Combine flour, ground cinnamon, baking soda, and salt (if desired).
6. Stir into the cooled apple mixture and mix well until combined.
7. In a separate bowl, combine eggs and liquid sweetener.
8. Add to the batter and stir until smooth.
9. Drop tablespoonfuls of batter onto a nonstick baking sheet.
10. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.
Yield: 2 dozen
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving (prepared without added salt) equals 1/2 starch, 1/2 fruit; also 54 calories, 24 mg sodium, 18 mg cholesterol, 11 gm carbohydrate, 1 gm protein, 1 gm fat.
